parts.text: Help me design the onboarding flow for our mobile app. I want a 3-screen flow. The app is built with Flutter. I prefer minimal copy.

Let's go with a 3-screen carousel: value prop, permissions, sign-in. We decided to use Firebase Auth. Here's the screen spec in onboarding/spec.md. Next step: we still need to define the permissions copy and add an analytics event per screen.
Great. TODO: localize all strings to Korean and English. Please always keep the copy under 12 words. Codename is Sprout.
